attacking_style: Opportunistic attacker who strikes in chaotic stages or from breakaways to gain GC time, rather than direct confrontations. Shows aggression in final kilometers (sub-300m) and contests KOM points on intermediate climbs.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy for Cofidis, often positioning aggressively for bonus seconds on categorized climbs. Limited visible domestique support; relies on being missed as secondary GC threat in breaks.
terrain_preference: Multi-climb stages where GC teams suffer focus fatigue. Exploits chaos better than pure climbing performance. Vulnerable on sustained final climbs where pure climbing strength matters.
vulnerability: Fades on final sustained climbs when pure climbing ability is tested (2 instances in Vuelta). Crash-prone when positioning aggressively early in stages. Physical durability concerns post-crash and with long COVID recovery.
key_patterns: Gains GC time opportunistically from breakaways when teams overlook him as threat (2 observations)
Contests KOM points aggressively on intermediate climbs even as GC rider (2 observations)
Positions aggressively early in stages, increasing crash exposure (2 observations)
Fades on sustained final climbs despite being in contention earlier (2 Vuelta stages)
Exploits stage chaos to jump GC positions without pure climbing dominance (2 observations)
Shows ambition beyond domestique role with late-race attacks sub-1km (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: recovering from long COVID in 2023 but showed preparation; historical pattern of injuries and durability concerns temper optimism
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 10
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7
